ab: lokah simu kwara’, t’ringa ta’ la.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: lawkah simu kwara’, t’ringa ta’ la.
ttuliq kwara’! tatuk tunux!
en: A: All rise, please! Salute!

ab: lokah su’, sinsi.
en: B: Hello.

ab: lawkah su’, sinsi.
en: B: Hello.

ab: sinsi, lokah su’ ga.
en: B: Hello.

ab: sinsi, lawkah su’ ga.
en: B: Hello.

ab: tama’.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: thzyuk.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: lokah simu kwara’. kira’ ga, psbaqan simu ni sinsi maha nanu’ son na ’Tayal qu nniqun.
ch: A+:大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的泰雅語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Thai.

ab: lawkah simu kwara’. kira’ ga, psbaqan simu ni sinsi maha nanu’ sawn na ’Tayal qu nniqun.
ch: A:大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的泰雅語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Thai.

ab: baqun su’ mung ke’ ni sinsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: baqun su’ mung kay’ ni sinsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi, ini’ maku’ baqi mung. kayal lozi minxal ku?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: sinsi, ini’ maku’ baqi mung. kazyal lawzi minxal ma’?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ini’ maku’ pongi, pkrahu’ cikay hngzyang su’ ku?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: ini’ maku’ pawngi, pkrahu’ cikay hngzyang su’ ma’?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: ini’ maku’ pongi, pkhngzyang cikay ke’ su’ ku?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: ini’ maku’ pawngi, pkhngzyang cikay kay’ su’ ma’?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: kita’ sqani! glu kuzing lmpuw minxal.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: baq su’ balay lmpuw.
en: It’s very well read.

ab: blaq balay lnpuw su’.
en: It’s very well read.

ab: lpuw lozi wah. pkhngzyang cikay.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: lpuw lawzi wah. pkhngzyang cikay.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: ’syang! laxi snqwaq.
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: agal biru’ mamu.
ch: A:請把你們的課本拿出來。
en: A: Please take out your textbooks.

ab: aw. sinsi.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: agal inpit su’.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: sinsi, zmungi’ saku’ maras inpit la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: agal ssom su’.
ch: A+:請把你的橡皮擦拿出來。
en: A: Please take out your eraser.

ab: agal ssawm su’.
ch: A:請把你的橡皮擦拿出來。
en: A: Please take out your eraser.

ab: sinsi, zmungi’ saku’ maras ssom la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: sinsi, zmungi’ saku’ maras ssawm la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: ksyugi cikay qu ssom ni rugak ka cyux bih su’.
ch: A+:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: ksyugi cikay qu ssawm ni rugak ka cyux bih su’.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pksyugi saku’ ssom su’ ku?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: pksyugi saku’ ssawm su’ ma’?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: mhngawa ta’ cikay ha.
en: Let’s take a break!

ab: nway mucing sqani qu pinqbaqan ta’ soni’, mkta ta’ babaw rihay la.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: We’ll go up here and see you next week.

ab: nway mucing sqani qu pinqbaqan ta’ sawni’, mkta ta’ babaw rihay la.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
